description: This video explains how to short on margin trading using Binance. It covers the process of selling BTC at a high price and buying it back at a lower price to earn a profit. The video details the steps to transfer collateral, place orders, and manage risks using OCO orders.
topic_summary: Learn how to short BTC on margin trading with Binance, including collateral transfer, order placement, and risk management strategies [t=0:00-2:10].
aliases: How to Short on Margin Trading
